summary: Replayed ADR 0274 from the latest merged origin/main candidate, re-verified the Coolify publication path directly on coolify-lv3, and confirmed the governed repo-deploy image warm-cache contract end to end.

verification.observed: `python3 scripts/repo_deploy_image_cache.py validate` reported `Repo-deploy base image profile catalog OK`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-repo-deploy-validate.txt`.
`python3 scripts/repo_deploy_image_cache.py plan` rendered one approved profile and five seed refs, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-repo-deploy-plan.txt`.

`uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_repo_deploy_image_cache.py tests/test_coolify_playbook.py tests/test_coolify_runtime_role.py tests/test_docker_publication_assurance.py` returned `27 passed in 24.60s`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-targeted-pytest.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=coolify env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` completed with zero failed or unreachable hosts, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-live-apply.txt`; the final recap reported `coolify-lv3 : ok=161 changed=11 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=13`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=81 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=273 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=134`.

`sudo /usr/local/bin/lv3-docker-publication-assurance` returned `ok: true` with summary `docker publication contract is satisfied`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-docker-publication-verify.txt`.

`/opt/repo-deploy-image-cache/warm-status.json` reported `result: pass`, `successful_pulls: 5`, `failed_pulls: 0`, `changed_count: 0`, `plan_generated_at: 2026-03-30T12:21:46Z`, and `warmed_at: 2026-03-30T12:21:52Z`, while `lv3-repo-deploy-image-cache.timer` remained enabled and active; recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-coolify-cache-state-post.txt`.
`docker image inspect` resolved all five approved seed refs locally on `coolify-lv3`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-image-inspect.txt`.

`https://coolify.lv3.org/` and `/login` both returned the expected TLS-backed `302` redirect to `/oauth2/sign_in` with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-coolify-public-head.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-coolify-login-head.txt`.

`docs.lv3.org` and `changelog.lv3.org` still served `robots.txt` with `Disallow: /` after the exact-main replay, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-robots.txt`.

The Proxmox host remained `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base` on kernel `6.17.13-2-pve` with `pve-manager/9.1.6` and VM `170` running after the replay, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r5-host-state-post.txt`.

notes: The exact-main live apply was executed from the refreshed latest-main candidate rooted at source commit 2c5ee54e46e08671ed54713b743f9c03c162f3bc.
The live-apply wrapper required a canonical truth refresh for README.md before the latest-main replay could pass the repository gate.
The protected-file-only integration updates that move the repo to 0.177.102 and the platform metadata to 0.130.69 do not change the converged runtime behavior already verified by this replay.
